---
title: "Figure 1 - UMAP and proportions"
author: "Kimberly Olney, PhD"
date: "11/25/2025"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: cerulean
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "/tgen_labs/jfryer/kolney/LBD_CWOW/LBD_snRNA/scripts/")
setwd("/tgen_labs/jfryer/kolney/LBD_CWOW/LBD_snRNA/scripts/")
```

# Libraris, paths, colors
```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
source(here::here("/tgen_labs/jfryer/kolney/LBD_CWOW/LBD_snRNA/scripts/", "file_paths_and_colours.R"))
color.panel <- dittoColors()
```

# add small legend
```{r}
addSmallLegend <- function(myPlot, pointSize = 3, textSize = 8, spaceLegend = 1) {
    myPlot +
        guides(shape = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = pointSize)),
               color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = pointSize))) +
        theme(legend.title = element_text(size = textSize), 
              legend.text  = element_text(size = textSize),
              legend.key.size = unit(spaceLegend, "lines"))
}

color.panel <- c("#E69F00", "#56B4E9", "#009E73", "orchid4", "#0072B2", "#D55E00", "#CC79A7", "#666666", "#AD7700" ,"#1C91D4", "#007756")

genes_markers <-
  c("PLP1", 
    "MOG",
    "OLIG1", 
    "VCAN",
    "GFAP", 
    "AQP4", 
    "DOCK8", 
    "P2RY12",
    "SYT1",
    "RBFOX3",
    "GAD2",
    "EBF1",
    "COL1A2",
    "FLT1", 
    "ADGRF5"
)
```

# Read in object
```{r read_object}
projectID <- "CWOW_cellbender_RPCAIntegration_clean_RNA_annotation"

dataObject <- readRDS(paste0("../rObjects/",projectID,".rds"))
dataObject
# inspect
dataObject <- NormalizeData(dataObject)
```

# Cell proportion heatmap
```{r}
## Required packages
library(pheatmap)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Extract metadata
# ------------------------------------------------------------
meta <- dataObject@meta.data %>%
  dplyr::select(sample = Sample_ID, group, individual_clusters)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Compute cell-type proportions per sample
# ------------------------------------------------------------
cell_counts <- meta %>%
  group_by(sample, group, individual_clusters) %>%
   dplyr::summarise(n =dplyr::n(), .groups = "drop")

# total cells per sample
totals <- cell_counts %>%
  group_by(sample) %>%
   dplyr::summarise(total = sum(n))

# merge and compute proportion
cell_props <- left_join(cell_counts, totals, by = "sample") %>%
  mutate(prop = n / total)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Convert to matrix (celltype × sample)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
heatmap_mat <- cell_props %>%
  select(sample, individual_clusters, prop) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = sample, values_from = prop, values_fill = 0)

# Set rownames
heatmap_mat <- as.data.frame(heatmap_mat)
rownames(heatmap_mat) <- heatmap_mat$individual_clusters
heatmap_mat$individual_clusters <- NULL
heatmap_mat <- as.matrix(heatmap_mat)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Create annotation (sample groups)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
sample_ann <- meta %>% 
  dplyr::select(sample, group) %>% 
  distinct()

sample_ann <- sample_ann[match(colnames(heatmap_mat), sample_ann$sample), ]

annotation_col <- data.frame(Group = sample_ann$group)
rownames(annotation_col) <- sample_ann$Sample_ID

ann_colors <- list(
  Group = c(
    CONTROL = "#4682B4",
    AD_AT  = "#B4464B",
    LBD_S =  "gray",
    LBD_S = "gray65", 
    LBD_ATS = "gray35"
  )
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 5. Plot heatmap (similar to Fig. 1d)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
pheatmap(
  heatmap_mat,
  scale = "none",
  clustering_method = "ward.D2",
  cluster_cols = TRUE,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  color = colorRampPalette(c("navy", "white", "firebrick3"))(100),
  annotation_col = annotation_col,
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  fontsize_row = 9,
  fontsize_col = 8,
  border_color = NA
)
```

# DEG heatmaps
```{r}
###############################################
### Load libraries
###############################################
library(tidyverse)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
comparisons_to_plot <- list(
  c("AD_AT", "CONTROL"),
  c("LBD_S", "CONTROL"),
  c("LBD_AS", "CONTROL"),
  c("LBD_ATS", "CONTROL")
)

cell_types <- c("neuron", "interneuron", "oligodendrocyte", 
                "opc", "astrocyte", "microglia", "mural", "endothelial")

main_output_dir <- "/tgen_labs/jfryer/kolney/LBD_CWOW/LBD_snRNA/results/DEGs_RNA_pct0.25"

up_logfc_cutoff   <-  0.25
down_logfc_cutoff <- -0.25
padj_cutoff <- 0.05

###############################################
### Helper: safe read
###############################################
safe_read_deg <- function(path) {
  tryCatch(readr::read_tsv(path, show_col_types = FALSE),
    error = function(e)
      tryCatch(readr::read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE),
        error = function(e2)
          read.table(path, header = TRUE, sep = "", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)))
}

###############################################
### Find DEG files
###############################################
all_files <- list.files(
  main_output_dir,
  pattern = "^DEG_.*_vs_.*\\.(txt|csv|tsv)$",
  recursive = TRUE,
  full.names = TRUE
)

stopifnot(length(all_files) > 0)

file_df <- tibble(path = all_files) %>%
  mutate(bn = basename(path),
         noext = tools::file_path_sans_ext(bn),
         after_deg = str_remove(noext, "^DEG_"),
         cell_type = word(after_deg, 1, sep = fixed("_")),
         rest = str_remove(after_deg, paste0("^", cell_type, "_")),
         comparison = rest) %>%
  filter(cell_type %in% cell_types)

###############################################
### Convert comparisons_to_plot into strings
###############################################
plot_order <- sapply(comparisons_to_plot, function(x) paste0(x[1], "_vs_", x[2]))

file_df <- file_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(comparison %in% plot_order)

###############################################
### Function: Build Heatmap Matrix
###############################################
build_matrix_for_heatmap <- function(comparison_string) {
  
  # collect all DEGs from all cell types for this comparison
  df_list <- list()
  
  for (ct in cell_types) {
    f <- file_df %>% filter(cell_type == ct, comparison == comparison_string)
    if (nrow(f) == 1) {
      deg <- safe_read_deg(f$path)
      # required columns: gene, avg_log2FC, p_val_adj
      if (!"avg_log2FC" %in% colnames(deg)) {
        stop("DEG file missing avg_log2FC column: ", f$path)
      }
      if (!"p_val_adj" %in% colnames(deg)) {
        stop("DEG file missing p_val_adj column: ", f$path)
      }
      
      # apply FDR+logFC thresholds
      deg_filt <- deg %>%
        filter(p_val_adj <= padj_cutoff,
               avg_log2FC >= up_logfc_cutoff | avg_log2FC <= down_logfc_cutoff) %>%
        select(gene, avg_log2FC)
      
      if (nrow(deg_filt) > 0) {
        df_list[[ct]] <- deg_filt
      }
    }
  }
  
  # union of all DEGs across cell types
  all_genes <- unique(unlist(lapply(df_list, function(x) x$gene)))
  if (length(all_genes) == 0) {
    stop("No DEGs for comparison: ", comparison_string)
  }
  
  # matrix genes x cell_types
  mat <- matrix(0, nrow = length(all_genes), ncol = length(cell_types))
  rownames(mat) <- all_genes
  colnames(mat) <- cell_types
  
  for (ct in names(df_list)) {
    tmp <- df_list[[ct]]
    mat[tmp$gene, ct] <- tmp$avg_log2FC
  }
  
  return(mat)
}

###############################################
### Plot each comparison as a heatmap
### (matching panel d structure)
###############################################
dir.create("panel_d_heatmaps", showWarnings = FALSE)

for (comp in plot_order) {
  
  message("Building heatmap for: ", comp)
  
  mat <- build_matrix_for_heatmap(comp)
  
  # scale genes (rows) like the figure
  mat_scaled <- t(scale(t(mat)))
  
  # cell-type colors (panel legend)
  ct_colors <- c(
    neuron = "#1f77b4",
    interneuron = "#aec7e8",
    oligodendrocyte = "#2ca02c",
    opc = "#98df8a",
    astrocyte = "#ff7f0e",
    microglia = "#d62728",
    mural = "#9467bd",
    endothelial = "#8c564b"
  )
  
  ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
    CellType = colnames(mat_scaled),
    col = list(CellType = ct_colors),
    annotation_legend_param = list(title = "Cell type")
  )
  
  pdf(file = file.path("DEG_heatmaps", paste0("heatmap_", comp, ".pdf")),
      width = 5, height = 7)
  
  print(
    Heatmap(
      mat_scaled,
      name = "Scaled\nlog2FC",
      top_annotation = ha,
      cluster_rows = TRUE,
      cluster_columns = TRUE,
      show_row_names = FALSE,
      col = colorRamp2(c(-2, 0, 2), c("blue", "white", "red")),
      heatmap_legend_param = list(
        title = "Scaled log2FC",
        legend_height = unit(4, "cm")
      )
    )
  )
  
  dev.off()
}
```

### samples as columns
```{r}
# Required libraries
library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(pheatmap)
library(RColorBrewer)

# ---- User inputs (from your message) ----
dataObject <- dataObject        # Seurat v5 object already in your environment
main_output_dir <- "/tgen_labs/jfryer/kolney/LBD_CWOW/LBD_snRNA/results/DEGs_RNA_pct0.25"

comparisons_to_plot <- list(
  c("AD_AT",   "CONTROL"),
  c("LBD_S",   "CONTROL"),
  c("LBD_AS",  "CONTROL"),
  c("LBD_ATS", "CONTROL")
)

cell_types <- c("neuron", "interneuron", "oligodendrocyte",
                "opc", "astrocyte", "microglia", "mural", "endothelial")

up_logfc_cutoff   <- 0.25
down_logfc_cutoff <- -0.25
padj_cutoff       <- 0.05

# meta
meta <- dataObject@meta.data
# columns expected: meta$TYPE (group), meta$Sample_ID, meta$individual_clusters

# Expression matrix to use: change slot if you want other slots
expr_mat <- GetAssayData(dataObject, assay = "RNA", slot = "data") 
# rows = genes, cols = cells. Make sure rownames are gene symbols (or consistent with DEGs)
glimpse(expr_mat)
# helper to read DEG file for a given cell type and comparison
read_deg_for <- function(celltype, group1, group2, main_output_dir) {
  fname <- file.path(main_output_dir, celltype,
                     sprintf("DEG_%s_%s_vs_%s.txt", celltype, group1, group2))
  if (!file.exists(fname)) {
    # try alternate pattern (some people use underscores or different order)
    warning("DEG file not found: ", fname)
    return(NULL)
  }
  df <- read_tsv(fname, show_col_types = FALSE)
  # required columns: gene, avg_log2FC, p_val_adj (or p_val_adj)
  # normalize column names if needed
  colnames(df) <- tolower(colnames(df))
  if (!"gene" %in% colnames(df)) {
    stop("DEG file doesn't contain 'gene' column: ", fname)
  }
  # filter
  # keep up OR down if meet thresholds
  df_filt <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(gene)) %>%
    filter(p_val_adj <= padj_cutoff) %>%
    filter(avg_log2fc >= up_logfc_cutoff | avg_log2fc <= down_logfc_cutoff)
  unique(df_filt$gene)
}

# Main loop over comparisons
for (cmp in comparisons_to_plot) {
  group1 <- cmp[1]; group2 <- cmp[2]
  cat("Processing comparison:", group1, "vs", group2, "\n")
  # samples to include = samples that belong to either group in meta$TYPE
  samples_in_groups <- unique(meta$Sample_ID[meta$TYPE %in% c(group1, group2)])
  if (length(samples_in_groups) == 0) {
    warning("No samples found for groups:", group1, group2); next
  }
  # build empty matrix: rows = samples, cols = cell types
  mat <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = length(samples_in_groups), ncol = length(cell_types),
                dimnames = list(samples_in_groups, cell_types))
  # Also keep annotation for samples (their TYPEs) - if a sample appears in both TYPEs,
  # we mark as "mixed" (but typically sample should map to one TYPE)
  sample_type <- sapply(samples_in_groups, function(s) {
    types <- unique(meta$TYPE[meta$Sample_ID == s])
    if (length(types) == 1) return(types)
    paste(sort(types), collapse = ";")
  })
  sample_annotation <- data.frame(TYPE = sample_type)
  rownames(sample_annotation) <- samples_in_groups

  # loop through cell types
  for (ct in cell_types) {
    genes <- read_deg_for(ct, group1, group2, main_output_dir)
    if (is.null(genes) || length(genes) == 0) {
      message(sprintf("  - %s: no DE genes found or file missing", ct))
      next
    }
    # ensure genes exist in expr_mat; if DEGs use gene symbols different than rownames(expr_mat)
    genes_present <- intersect(genes, rownames(expr_mat))
    if (length(genes_present) == 0) {
      warning(sprintf("  - %s: no DE genes present in expression matrix for this cell type (after intersect).", ct))
      next
    }

    # For each sample, compute mean expression across DE genes across all cells from that (sample, ct)
    for (s in samples_in_groups) {
      # cells that belong to this sample AND this cell type AND are in either group
      which_cells <- which(meta$Sample_ID == s &
                           meta$individual_clusters == ct &
                           meta$TYPE %in% c(group1, group2))
      if (length(which_cells) == 0) {
        # leave NA
        next
      }
      # compute average expression for each gene across those cells, then average across genes
      # be mindful of performance: use matrix subsetting
      subexpr <- expr_mat[genes_present, which_cells, drop = FALSE]
      # If only one gene or one cell, rowMeans/colMeans handle that
      # mean over genes of mean expression per gene across cells:
      gene_means <- rowMeans(subexpr, na.rm = TRUE)       # mean per gene across cells
      value <- mean(gene_means, na.rm = TRUE)             # single summary number
      mat[s, ct] <- value
    }
  } # end cell type loop

  # Optionally scale the matrix (z-score rows or columns). Here we z-scale across cell types per sample:
  mat_scaled <- t(scale(t(mat)))  # scale rows (samples). Use scale(mat) to scale columns.
  # replace NaN (from constant rows) by 0
  mat_scaled[is.nan(mat_scaled)] <- NA_real_

  # Prepare annotation colors
  annotation_colors <- list()
  types_unique <- unique(sample_annotation$TYPE)
  pal <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(min(8, max(3, length(types_unique))), "Set2"))(length(types_unique))
  names(pal) <- types_unique
  annotation_colors$TYPE <- pal

  # Make the heatmap
  out_name <- sprintf("heatmap_geneset_mean_%s_vs_%s.png", group1, group2)
  png(out_name, width = 1600, height = 1000, res = 150)
  pheatmap(mat_scaled,
           cluster_rows = TRUE,
           cluster_cols = TRUE,
           na_col = "grey90",
           annotation_row = sample_annotation,
           annotation_colors = annotation_colors,
           main = sprintf("%s vs %s — sample x celltype mean(DEG expression)", group1, group2),
           fontsize_row = 8,
           fontsize_col = 10,
           show_rownames = TRUE,
           show_colnames = TRUE,
           color = colorRampPalette(rev(brewer.pal(n = 7, name = "RdYlBu")))(100))
  dev.off()
  cat("Saved heatmap to:", out_name, "\n\n")
}
```

# gene columns
```{r}
# Packages (install if missing)
pkgs <- c("Seurat","dplyr","readr","ComplexHeatmap","circlize","RColorBrewer","grid")
for (p in pkgs) if (!requireNamespace(p, quietly=TRUE)) install.packages(p, repos="https://cloud.r-project.org")
library(Seurat); library(dplyr); library(readr); library(ComplexHeatmap); library(circlize); library(RColorBrewer); library(grid)

# ---- User inputs ----
dataObject <- dataObject   # Seurat object must exist in environment
main_output_dir <- "/tgen_labs/jfryer/kolney/LBD_CWOW/LBD_snRNA/results/DEGs_RNA_pct0.25"
out_dir <- "/tgen_labs/jfryer/kolney/LBD_CWOW/LBD_snRNA/results/heatmap/"
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

comparisons_to_plot <- list(
  c("AD_AT",   "CONTROL"),
  c("LBD_S",   "CONTROL"),
  c("LBD_AS",  "CONTROL"),
  c("LBD_ATS", "CONTROL")
)

cell_types <- c("neuron", "interneuron", "oligodendrocyte",
                "opc", "astrocyte", "microglia", "mural", "endothelial")

up_logfc_cutoff   <- 0.25
down_logfc_cutoff <- -0.25
padj_cutoff       <- 0.05
top_n_per_ct      <- 20   # <- selecting top 20 DEGs per cell type by |avg_log2FC|

meta <- dataObject@meta.data
stopifnot(all(c("TYPE","Sample_ID","individual_clusters") %in% colnames(meta)))

# Expression matrix (rows = genes, cols = cells)
expr_mat <- as.matrix(GetAssayData(dataObject, assay = "RNA", slot = "data"))

# helper: read & return top N genes for a cell type & comparison
read_top_degs <- function(celltype, g1, g2, top_n = 20) {
  fname <- file.path(main_output_dir, celltype,
                     sprintf("DEG_%s_%s_vs_%s.txt", celltype, g1, g2))
  if (!file.exists(fname)) {
    warning("Missing DEG file: ", fname)
    return(character(0))
  }
  d <- read_tsv(fname, show_col_types = FALSE)
  names(d) <- tolower(names(d))
  if (!"gene" %in% names(d) || !"avg_log2fc" %in% names(d) || !"p_val_adj" %in% names(d)) {
    stop("DEG file missing expected columns (gene, avg_log2FC, p_val_adj): ", fname)
  }
  d <- d %>%
    filter(!is.na(gene)) %>%
    filter(p_val_adj <= padj_cutoff) %>%
    filter(avg_log2fc >= up_logfc_cutoff | avg_log2fc <= down_logfc_cutoff) %>%
    mutate(abs_lfc = abs(avg_log2fc)) %>%
    arrange(desc(abs_lfc))
  if (nrow(d) == 0) return(character(0))
  top_genes <- unique(d$gene)[seq_len(min(top_n, length(unique(d$gene))))]
  top_genes
}

# Loop over comparisons
for (cmp in comparisons_to_plot) {
  group1 <- cmp[1]; group2 <- cmp[2]
  message("Processing: ", group1, " vs ", group2)

  # samples in the groups
  samples_in_groups <- unique(meta$Sample_ID[meta$TYPE %in% c(group1, group2)])
  if (length(samples_in_groups) == 0) {
    warning("No samples for groups: ", group1, ", ", group2); next
  }

  # Build list of columns = celltype|GENE (top N per cell type)
  col_list <- character()
  col_celltype <- character()
  gene_lookup <- list()
  for (ct in cell_types) {
    top_genes <- read_top_degs(ct, group1, group2, top_n = top_n_per_ct)
    if (length(top_genes) == 0) {
      message("  - ", ct, ": no top DEGs passing filters")
      next
    }
    # only keep genes present in expr_mat
    genes_present <- intersect(top_genes, rownames(expr_mat))
    if (length(genes_present) == 0) {
      warning("  - ", ct, ": none of the top DEGs exist in expression matrix; skipping those genes")
      next
    }
    cols_ct <- paste0(ct, "|", genes_present)
    col_list <- c(col_list, cols_ct)
    col_celltype <- c(col_celltype, rep(ct, length(cols_ct)))
    for (i in seq_along(cols_ct)) gene_lookup[[ cols_ct[i] ]] <- genes_present[i]
    message("  - ", ct, ": using ", length(genes_present), " genes (requested ", length(top_genes), ")")
  }

  if (length(col_list) == 0) {
    warning("No columns (genes) found for comparison ", group1, " vs ", group2); next
  }

  # Initialize matrix (samples x columns)
  mat <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = length(samples_in_groups), ncol = length(col_list),
                dimnames = list(samples_in_groups, col_list))

  # Fill matrix: for each sample x (celltype|gene) compute mean expression across cells of that sample & cell type
  for (colname in col_list) {
    gene_sym <- gene_lookup[[colname]]
    ct <- strsplit(colname, "\\|")[[1]][1]
    for (s in samples_in_groups) {
      cells_idx <- which(meta$Sample_ID == s &
                         meta$individual_clusters == ct &
                         meta$TYPE %in% c(group1, group2))
      if (length(cells_idx) == 0) next
      if (!gene_sym %in% rownames(expr_mat)) next
      vals <- expr_mat[gene_sym, cells_idx, drop = TRUE]
      mat[s, colname] <- mean(vals, na.rm = TRUE)
    }
  }

  # Column-scaling (z-score) for visualization
  mat_scaled <- mat
  col_means <- apply(mat, 2, function(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE))
  col_sds   <- apply(mat, 2, function(x) sd(x, na.rm = TRUE))
  for (j in seq_len(ncol(mat))) {
    if (is.na(col_sds[j]) || col_sds[j] == 0) {
      mat_scaled[, j] <- (mat[, j] - col_means[j])  # will be NA or zeros
    } else {
      mat_scaled[, j] <- (mat[, j] - col_means[j]) / col_sds[j]
    }
  }

  # Column annotation (cell type)
  col_df <- data.frame(celltype = col_celltype)
  rownames(col_df) <- col_list
  ct_levels <- unique(col_df$celltype)
  ct_pal <- setNames(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(min(8, max(3, length(ct_levels))), "Set2"))(length(ct_levels)), ct_levels)
  col_ha <- HeatmapAnnotation(df = col_df, which = "column", col = list(celltype = ct_pal), show_legend = TRUE)

  # Row annotation: TYPE per sample
  row_df <- data.frame(TYPE = sapply(samples_in_groups, function(s) {
    types <- unique(meta$TYPE[meta$Sample_ID == s])
    if (length(types) == 1) return(types)
    paste(sort(types), collapse = ";")
  }))
  rownames(row_df) <- samples_in_groups
  type_levels <- unique(row_df$TYPE)
  type_pal <- setNames(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(min(8, max(3, length(type_levels))), "Set2"))(length(type_levels)), type_levels)
  row_ha <- rowAnnotation(df = row_df, col = list(TYPE = type_pal))

  # Column split by cell type (keeps genes grouped)
  column_split <- col_df$celltype

  # Color function for z-scores
  col_fun <- colorRamp2(c(-2, 0, 2), c("blue", "white", "red"))

  ht <- Heatmap(mat_scaled,
                name = "zscore",
                col = col_fun,
                na_col = "grey90",
                cluster_rows = TRUE,
                cluster_columns = TRUE,
                show_row_names = TRUE,
                show_column_names = FALSE,
                row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 9),
                top_annotation = col_ha,
                left_annotation = row_ha,
                column_split = column_split,
                column_title = NULL,
                heatmap_legend_param = list(title = "z-score"))

  out_png <- file.path(out_dir, sprintf("heatmap_top%d_DEGs_perCT_%s_vs_%s.png", top_n_per_ct, group1, group2))
  out_pdf <- file.path(out_dir, sprintf("heatmap_top%d_DEGs_perCT_%s_vs_%s.pdf", top_n_per_ct, group1, group2))

  # Save PNG
  png(out_png, width = 3000, height = 1200, res = 200)
  draw(ht, merge_legends = TRUE)
  dev.off()

  # Save PDF
  pdf(out_pdf, width = 14, height = 8)
  draw(ht, merge_legends = TRUE)
  dev.off()

  message("Saved: ", out_png, " and ", out_pdf)
}
```
